name: warden
description: Tooling for the nono-jailed Claude Code setup

plugins.name: warden
plugins.description: Skills for the nono-sandboxed ('jailed') Claude Code, both host-run: setup-jail (host provisions the jail's command-policy config, bash-read allowlist, and audit-log hook into the jail's config dir via $JAIL_DIR) and tune-nono (correlates nono kernel denials with the jail's permission-requests log and drafts nono profile edits). Leans on the housekeep command-policy skill. CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR-aware.
